ddls:
CREATE TABLE "workshops" (
  "workshop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workshop */,
  "workshop_name" TEXT /* Name of the workshop */,
  "pd_topic_area" TEXT /* Area of professional development (e.g., MYP, PYP) */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the workshop (e.g., Cat 1, Cat 2) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Online, In-person) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the workshop */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the workshop */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the workshop is held */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the programs table */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the schools table */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the workshop_versions table */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the workshop */,
  "objectives" TEXT /* Learning objectives of the workshop */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the workshop */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the workshop was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workshop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workshops_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workshops_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workshops_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workshops_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workshops_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES workshop_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the location */,
  "latlong" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, facilitator, participant) */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the schools table */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the programs table */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "workshop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workshop the user is registered for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who registered */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered for the workshop */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., pending, confirmed, cancelled) */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Attendance status of the user */,
  "evaluation_status" TEXT /* Evaluation status of the user */,
  "certificate_issued" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if a certificate has been issued to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_workshop_id FOREIGN KEY ("workshop_id") REFERENCES workshops ("workshop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workshop_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback submission */,
  "workshop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workshop the feedback is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "question_1" TEXT /* Additional question to gather specific feedback */,
  "question_2" TEXT /* Additional question to gather specific feedback */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workshop_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workshop_feedback_workshop_id FOREIGN KEY ("workshop_id") REFERENCES workshops ("workshop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workshop_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "workshop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workshop the version is for */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the workshop */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved, archived) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workshop_versions_workshop_id FOREIGN KEY ("workshop_id") REFERENCES workshops ("workshop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workshop_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workshop_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the locations table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
